content: So, it finally happened! I thought that it would never happen, but here we are, i finally have a personal site i can upload my works onto, it cannot be any better! I really hope anyone who would see that someday will find my projects fascinating :). Next thing i'd want to do is most likely script in python to automate creation of markdown files for posts.
description: Just a first post to test if they even work.

title: First post on my personal website!
